returns.google_given_name: string (first name from Google OAuth payload)
returns.google_photo_url: string (URL of the Google profile picture)

onAuthStateChange(callback).notes: Wraps Firebase Auth onAuthStateChanged; fires immediately with current state and on every sign-in/out.

displayName(user).notes: Returns user.nickname if non-empty, else user.google_given_name. Lobby uses this for the seated-player labels.

notes: section-2 (lobby) consumes the resolved user identity to render seated-player profile pictures and to attribute the local user's Join action. The auth shell owns sign-in/out; the lobby never directly calls Firebase Auth.
